name: stray-robotics
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for ROS 2-first robotics software development.

interface.shortDescription: Build, debug, test, and operate robotics software workflows with ROS 2-first safety boundaries.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin for robotics software development. It helps agents create, modify, debug, test, containerize, and CI-enable ROS 2 workspaces, packages, nodes, launch files, interfaces, simulations, and robot application integrations while requiring target-distro verification, explicit approval for host dependency changes, and separate safety boundaries for live hardware, actuators, and networked robots.
defaultPrompt: Create or modify a ROS 2 workspace, package, node, launch file, or interface.
Debug a ROS 2 graph using nodes, topics, services, actions, parameters, QoS, tf2, and rosbag evidence.
Add ROS 2 build, test, rosdep, Docker, devcontainer, or CI support.
Plan a ROS 2 simulation or visualization workflow with Gazebo, RViz, launch files, and bag data.
Review ROS 2 hardware-operation safety boundaries before running robot-affecting commands.
